raw_title: Book Review: ‘Cool Machine,’ by Colson Whitehead
description: The final installment of his Harlem crime trilogy is full of heists, cultural shifts and nostalgia for 1980s New York.

raw_title: Book Review: ‘The Lost Founder,’ by Jesse Wegman
description: In “The Lost Founder,” the journalist Jesse Wegman looks back at a largely forgotten and singular voice that helped make the United States what it is today.
